op.text: Took first weekend trip using new Friday off: cabin near Mt Hood 2025-11-08 weekend with Sam. Described as 'the good kind of ordinary' — hiking, reading, cooking, no agenda. First Friday off was 2025-11-01.

op.note: Session 2025-11-08: Dana reports the work-stress interpersonal strain from Q4 planning has fully resolved after moving to four-day week. Weekend at Mt Hood cabin showed 'we were us' again with no tension. Sam observed 'I like you at four days a week already.' Dana described herself as 'lighter' and 'easier to live with' off the work pressure. Strain was situational, not relational.
